mapper.sql: dispute_id, tenant_id, raised_by_owner_id, related_property_opid, dispute_kind, related_entity_type, related_entity_id, current_review_level, status, business_payload::text AS business_payload, raised_at, escalated_at, closed_at, litigation_outcome, litigation_judgement_url, version, create_time, update_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM t_owner_dispute WHERE dispute_id = #{disputeId} FOR UPDATE
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_owner_dispute ( tenant_id, raised_by_owner_id, related_property_opid, dispute_kind, related_entity_type, related_entity_id, current_review_level, status, business_payload, raised_at, escalated_at, closed_at, litigation_outcome, litigation_judgement_url, version ) VALUES ( #{tenantId}, #{raisedByOwnerId}, #{relatedPropertyOpid}, #{disputeKind}, #{relatedEntityType}, #{relatedEntityId}, #{currentReviewLevel}, #{status}, CAST(#{businessPayload} AS JSONB), #{raisedAt}, #{escalatedAt}, #{closedAt}, #{litigationOutcome}, #{litigationJudgementUrl}, #{version} )
mapper.update: UPDATE t_owner_dispute SET related_entity_type = #{relatedEntityType}, related_entity_id = #{relatedEntityId}, current_review_level = #{currentReviewLevel}, status = #{status}, business_payload = CAST(#{businessPayload} AS JSONB), escalated_at = #{escalatedAt}, closed_at = #{closedAt}, litigation_outcome = #{litigationOutcome}, litigation_judgement_url = #{litigationJudgementUrl}, version = version + 1, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE dispute_id = #{disputeId} AND version = #{version}
